name: Hawaiian Wedding Cake (from Scratch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and sugar.
3. Add eggs, pineapple with its juice, and nuts; mix well.
4. Pour batter into a lightly greased 9" x 13" x 2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
7. Beat softened cream cheese until fluffy.
8. Whip in confectioners' sugar and softened butter.
9. Spread the whipped cream cheese mixture over the cooled cake.
10. Cut into 3-inch squares. Makes 12 servings.
